prediction.reasoning: Without historical data for MCO, I applied a random walk model assuming daily volatility of approximately 2.5% (typical for crypto assets). Confidence intervals expand with time and confidence level, reflecting increasing uncertainty over the 20-day horizon. The intervals are symmetric around the current price, with the 50% CI showing roughly ±5.5% range, 80% CI showing ±10.3% range, and 90% CI showing ±13.8% range.
